meaning: a collection of choice items (poems, photos etc)
sentence: 这本书是历年优秀散文的集锦。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū shì lìnián yōuxiù sǎnwén de jíjǐn.
english: This book is a collection of the best essays from over the years.

sentence: 印度传统社会中，种姓制度影响很深。
pinyin: Yìndù chuántǒng shèhuì zhōng, zhǒngxìng zhìdù yǐngxiǎng hěn shēn.
english: In traditional Indian society, the caste system has had a very deep influence.

sentence: 这篇报道有明显的倾向性，不够客观。
pinyin: Zhè piān bàodào yǒu míngxiǎn de qīngxiàngxìng, bú gòu kèguān.
english: This report has an obvious bias and is not objective enough.

sentence: 这台洗衣机的电动机坏了，需要更换。
pinyin: Zhè tái xǐyījī de diàndòngjī huài le, xūyào gēnghuàn.
english: The electric motor in this washing machine broke and needs to be replaced.

sentence: 这首歌广为流传，大家都会唱。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē guǎngwéi liúchuán, dàjiā dōu huì chàng.
english: This song has spread widely and everyone knows how to sing it.
